name: LeanPowers
description: Lightweight, high-rigor engineering workflows with opt-in project-local learning for Codex and Claude Code.
positioningZh: 轻量但不降级的 Agent 工程工作流

interface.longDescription: Risk-adaptive engineering workflows for shaping, building, debugging, reviewing, verifying, and shipping software, with optional opt-in project learning from explicit feedback.
defaultPrompt: Build this feature with the lightest safe workflow.
Debug this failure and prove the root cause.
Enable LeanPowers learning for this project and explain the local privacy boundary.
